impacts.description: Contribution to the EU Apply AI Strategy by advancing next-generation AI agent capabilities for real-world applications across economic sectors.
Advancement of European R&D through sharing of communicable results with the research community via the AI-on-demand platform.
Economic deployment impact through validation in Testing and Experiment Facilities and deployment via European Digital Innovation Hubs (EDIHs), enabling industry uptake of AI agent technologies.
Advancement of EU open strategic autonomy in digital and emerging enabling technologies through next-generation AI agent research and deployment.
impacts.inference_note: Derived from the call's stated Destination field 'Achieving open strategic autonomy in digital and emerging enabling technologies (2026-27)'. All topics under this destination are expected to contribute to this policy impact objective; the destination header constitutes a programmatic impact framing that binds all funded projects under HORIZON-CL4-2026-05.

impacts.description: Societal impact through real-world AI agent applications in priority sectors: healthcare, advanced manufacturing, and in-vehicle autonomous driving.
